description: Which of the 3 data subsets this entry belongs to

The unique identifier for the home. To be more precise, this is the unique identifier for the home-resident pair. Thus, if a resident moves, the data collected from the house is associated with a new data ID.

This field will read Single-Family Home if this is a freestanding single-family home, Town Home if it is a home that shares at least one wall with a neighboring house, or Apartment if it is an apartment.
participant's city
participant's state
If eGauge electricity data is present, this field will show the minimum timestamp of the available data.
If eGauge electricity data is present, this field will show the maximum timestamp of the available data.
This field shows how much one minute data  is available for each home.
The date on which this participant enrolled with Pecan Street.
The total square footage of the home.
The year in which this home was constructed.
If eGauge electricity data is present in one second interval, this field will show the minimum timestamp of the available data.
If eGauge electricity data is present in one second interval, this field will show the maximum timestamp of the available data.
This field shows how much one second data  is available for each home.
this field will show yes if this participant is currently enrolled with Pecan Street and will be blank otherwise.
This field will show 'yes' if this participant has a solar photovoltaic system installed at their home and will be blank otherwise.
The date on which this participant withdrew from participating with Pecan Street. If this field is blank, the participant is still enrolled.
The square footage of the first floor of the home.
If ERT gas data is present, this field will show the minimum timestamp of the available data.
If ERT gas data is present, this field will show the maximum timestamp of the available data.
This field shows how much gas data is available for each home.

The square footage of the second floor of the home. If this field is blank and this home’s first floor square footage is indicated, there is no second floor. If the first floor square footage is not indicated, the number of floors of the home is unknown.

The square footage of the third floor of the home. If this field is blank and this home’s first floor square footage is indicated, there is no third floor. If the first floor square footage is not indicated, the number of floors of the home is unknown.
Size of pv system.
pv_panel_direction. Direction solar panels are facing
Size of pv system facing south .
Size of pv system facing west .
If indoor temperature sensor data is present, this field will show the minimum timestamp of the available data.
If indoor temperature sensor data is present, this field will show the maximum timestamp of the available data.
This field shows how much indoor temperature data is available for each home.
If ERT water data is present, this field will show the minimum timestamp of the available data.
If ERT water data is present, this field will show the maximum timestamp of the available data.
This field shows how much water data is available for each home.

The square footage of a half floor in the home. If this field is blank and this home’s first floor square footage is indicated, there is no half floor. If the first floor square footage is not indicated, the number of floors of the home is unknown.

The square footage of a lower level floor in the home. If this field is blank and this home’s first floor square footage is indicated, there is no lower level floor. If the first floor square footage is not indicated, the number of floors of the home is unknown.
The number of Nest thermostats installed at the residence. If blank, this participant is not known to have a Nest thermostat in their home.
Size of pv system facing east .

General lighting and plugs circuit eGauge data present. This type of circuit includes lights, fans, and wall outlets, often from multiple rooms in the home.
Natural gas-powered clothes dryer (120V circuit) eGauge data present. The eGauge will only pick up the electricity use from the dryer’s drum rotation, not the gas heating signature.

eGauge data present for any type of pump that is not a pool pump. Not used to pump wells, sewers, or pools.
